pitch_text: Good evening here in Chennai, hosting its first game. Let's start with the dimensions first because this is a bigger venue. 66 on my left, 67 on my right, straight boundary of 78. I mean, that's the reason the spinners have done well traditionally at this venue. Yeah, it's a pleasant evening, no doubt about it. Look, I think it's an absolute belter. I think it's a batter's paradise. I don't think it's going to matter too much whether you win the toss and bat first or bat second. I can't see too much dew setting in. Again, if we have a look at the pitch, it looks a little bit dry under this grass. But I'll tell you what it is, Deep, It's rock hard. I think the ball is going to come on nicely. I think the bowlers are in for a tough night, unfortunately. Maybe change your pace through the middle of the innings and try and get some wickets up front with that brand-new ball. I would second that. This looks like a really good surface to bat on. Should help both the teams and their six-hitting prowess, especially the Punjab Kings batters. But I still say, win the toss, chase, reckon Deep Dasgupta and Michael Clarke. Hello from Chepauk. The two captains shadow practice at each end of the wicket. No doubts over Shreyas' participation, he looked in majestic touch last night during the practice session, says Narbavi. Yuzi Chahal comes running all the way to the sidelines and shares a hug with local boy Ashwin who is on broadcasting duties, he adds. While the Super Kings enjoy a solid record at home, they have been beaten thrice in succession since the 2023 season. Their biggest trade ahead of the 2026 auctions - Sanju Samson - doesn't enjoy a great record either. But so does Shreyas Iyer while Yuzvendra Chahal loves bowling here. The 2026 T20 WC saw high scores at this venue and we could be in for another batting friendly surface today.
notes: Match 7 IPL 2026: Punjab Kings chose to bowl → CSK bat first. Impact pools: CSK Jamie Overton, Rahul Chahar, Matthew Short, Ramakrishna Ghosh, Gurjapneet Singh; PK Suryansh Shedge, Priyansh Arya, Vishnu Vinod, Pravin Dubey, Hemant Brar. Process 1A: Jamie Overton + Suryansh Shedge as 12th.
